symptoms.diagnosis: STRAIGHT: Check play field unit switches for debris or misalignment. TRUE: Inspect reset solenoid coil resistance (should be 10-20 ohms). FLUSH: Verify unit stepping cam and rack mechanism for wear.
STRAIGHT: Check lamp bulbs and sockets for corrosion. TRUE: Test stepper unit coil continuity; verify 6-12V AC at lamp circuits. FLUSH: Check relay coil for shorts or open circuits.
STRAIGHT: Inspect slingshot spring tension and mechanical linkage. TRUE: Check lane switch continuity and solenoid coil (15-30 ohms). FLUSH: Verify relay logic and associated switches.

symptoms.symptom: LED flash code: Single slow flash
symptoms.diagnosis: STRAIGHT: Check 5V and 12V power supply voltages. TRUE: Verify ROM checksum in MPU by counting LED flashes. FLUSH: If ROM bad, replace MPU board or burn corrected ROM.
STRAIGHT: Check RAM circuits on MPU board. TRUE: Verify RAM address/data lines for continuity. FLUSH: Replace RAM chips if faulty.

symptoms.symptom: LED flash code: Rapid blinking (4+ flashes)
symptoms.diagnosis: STRAIGHT: Check all solenoid driver circuits and associated wiring. TRUE: Examine watchdog timer circuit; verify clock oscillator. FLUSH: Replace driver ICs or oscillator crystal.
STRAIGHT: Check power supply connections to MPU. TRUE: Verify 5V at U2/U3 IC power pins. FLUSH: Check for shorted capacitors or IC failures.
STRAIGHT: Check for visible burn marks or solder bridges on power board. TRUE: Measure resistance across power rails; look for short circuits. FLUSH: Replace burned components or power board.
STRAIGHT: Check bumper switch continuity and cleanliness. TRUE: Verify 10V to bumper solenoid; check driver transistor. FLUSH: Replace solenoid driver or solenoid assembly.
STRAIGHT: Check display connector pins for corrosion. TRUE: Verify segment driver voltage (4.5-5.5V). FLUSH: Replace display or driver IC.

name: WPC Era (90s)
fix: Check F114 (8 Amp) and F115 (3/4 Amp) fuses.

symptoms.diagnosis: STRAIGHT: Inspect power board for visible damage or wet areas. TRUE: Check fuses F114 and F115; verify continuity across ground circuits. FLUSH: Replace damaged power board section or remove problematic solenoid.
STRAIGHT: Check if ball is physically stuck; verify tilt mechanism. TRUE: Measure voltage at gate solenoid (8V typical). FLUSH: Replace gate solenoid or check gate switch logic.
STRAIGHT: Verify flipper button is making contact. TRUE: Check flipper solenoid voltage and resistance. FLUSH: Replace flipper solenoid or EOS switch.
STRAIGHT: Check if LCD backlight is operational (should see glow). TRUE: Verify 12V power to display module; check ribbon cable. FLUSH: Replace LCD assembly or power supply board.

symptoms.symptom: Game not starting after coin insertion
symptoms.diagnosis: STRAIGHT: Verify coin switch makes audible click. TRUE: Check 5V to coin logic circuit on CPU board; measure switch voltage. FLUSH: Replace coin switch or software update CPU.
